---
title: "Personal works"
pagetitle: "Personal works — Duc Thai Tran"
---

```{=html}
<section class="block" style="border-bottom:none; padding-bottom:1rem;">
  <p class="eyebrow">Photography</p>
</section>

<section>
  <div class="gallery">

    <a class="shot shot--tall" href="#">
      <div class="shot__frame"><img src="images/photo-01.jpg" alt="Photo project one"></div>
      <div class="shot__cap"><span class="shot__name">Project One</span><span class="shot__type">Street · 2025</span></div>
    </a>

    <a class="shot shot--tall" href="#">
      <div class="shot__frame"><img src="images/photo-03.jpg" alt="Photo project two"></div>
      <div class="shot__cap"><span class="shot__name">Project Two</span><span class="shot__type">Documentary · 2024</span></div>
    </a>

    <a class="shot shot--wide" href="#">
      <div class="shot__frame"><img src="images/photo-02.jpg" alt="Photo project three"></div>
      <div class="shot__cap"><span class="shot__name">Project Three</span><span class="shot__type">Series · 2024</span></div>
    </a>

    <a class="shot shot--wide" href="#">
      <div class="shot__frame"><img src="images/photo-04.jpg" alt="Photo project four"></div>
      <div class="shot__cap"><span class="shot__name">Project Four</span><span class="shot__type">Street · 2023</span></div>
    </a>

    <a class="shot shot--tall" href="#">
      <div class="shot__frame"><img src="images/photo-05.jpg" alt="Photo project five"></div>
      <div class="shot__cap"><span class="shot__name">Project Five</span><span class="shot__type">Documentary · 2023</span></div>
    </a>

    <a class="shot shot--tall" href="#">
      <div class="shot__frame"><img src="images/photo-06.jpg" alt="Photo project six"></div>
      <div class="shot__cap"><span class="shot__name">Project Six</span><span class="shot__type">Series · 2022</span></div>
    </a>

  </div>
</section>

<section class="block" style="margin-top:3rem;">
  <p class="eyebrow">Writing</p>

  <div class="index">
    <article class="index__row">
      <div class="index__num">01</div>
      <div>
        <h3 class="index__title"><a href="#">Essay title goes here</a></h3>
        <p class="index__meta">Video essay · 2025 · On film form and attention</p>
      </div>
      <div class="index__tag">Essay</div>
    </article>
    <article class="index__row">
      <div class="index__num">02</div>
      <div>
        <h3 class="index__title"><a href="#">A second piece of writing</a></h3>
        <p class="index__meta">Written essay · 2024 · Reading notes</p>
      </div>
      <div class="index__tag">Writing</div>
    </article>
    <article class="index__row">
      <div class="index__num">03</div>
      <div>
        <h3 class="index__title"><a href="#">AdTranslated — a research note</a></h3>
        <p class="index__meta">AdTranslated · 2024 · Advertising research, made readable</p>
      </div>
      <div class="index__tag">Note</div>
    </article>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-foot">
  <span>Duc Thai Tran — Sydney</span>
  <span><a href="mailto:ducthai.tran@outlook.com">ducthai.tran@outlook.com</a></span>
  <span>© 2026</span>
</footer>
```
